rationale: In the editorial, Chen et al. (2021) is cited as one example among many papers in the special issue. The mentions are brief and descriptive (e.g., linking location and eye-tracking data, using ambulatory eye-tracking in grocery shopping) to illustrate types of multimedia data collection and integration. The citing paper does not build arguments, hypotheses, or methodological choices around this specific study's findings. So the citation functions as an illustrative reference rather than a substantive dependency.
